metadata.packName: Purview and Defender Signal Correlation Model for Banking Finance Scenarios
metadata.purpose: Define how synthetic banking/finance user activities should map to Purview, Defender, Copilot, DLP, endpoint, identity, and insider-risk-style signals.

signalCategories.description: Signals generated when files are created, modified, accessed, downloaded, moved, copied, printed, or shared across SharePoint, OneDrive, Office Web, and endpoints.

signals.description: A new file is created in SharePoint, OneDrive, or Office Web.
A file is edited or saved.
A file is opened or viewed.
A file is downloaded from cloud storage.
A file or link is shared internally or externally.
A sensitive file is printed from a managed endpoint or browser.
A file is copied to a network share or non-standard location.
A file is copied to removable media.

signalCategories.description: Signals related to applying, changing, removing, or recommending Microsoft Purview sensitivity labels.

signals.description: A user applies a sensitivity label to a file.
A file label changes from one sensitivity level to another.
A label is removed from a file containing or likely containing sensitive information.
A label recommendation appears due to detected sensitive content.
A user changes a file from a higher sensitivity label to a lower one.

signalCategories.description: Signals generated by Microsoft Purview Data Loss Prevention across Exchange, SharePoint, OneDrive, Teams, Endpoint, and Power BI.

signals.description: Sensitive content matches a DLP policy condition.
A user receives a DLP warning or policy tip.
DLP blocks a risky action.
A user overrides or attempts to override a DLP warning with justification.
Endpoint DLP detects copy, print, upload, or transfer of protected content.

signalCategories.description: Signals generated by Copilot for Microsoft 365 or external AI application usage.

signals.description: A user prompts Copilot or receives AI output inside Microsoft 365.
AI interaction references or accesses sensitive content.
A user interacts with an external or unmanaged AI application using sensitive data.
Sensitive content is uploaded or pasted into an unmanaged application.
Copilot uses or references a file as part of the generated response.

signalCategories.description: Signals from Entra ID, Conditional Access, guest access, and access reviews.

signals.description: A sign-in is risky due to impossible travel, unfamiliar location, or other risk factors.
Conditional Access policy is triggered.
MFA is required for a session.
A guest user is added to a team, group, or site.
An external user accesses shared content.
Access should be reviewed due to broad, inherited, stale, or external permissions.

signalCategories.description: Signals from Outlook, Teams, Viva Engage, Loop, and communications review scenarios.

signals.description: An internal email is sent.
An email is sent to an external recipient.
A Teams chat or channel message is sent.
A file is shared in Teams.
A communication compliance condition is matched.
A Viva Engage or community post is created.

signalCategories.description: Signals involving dashboard viewing, export, sharing, or underlying data extraction.

signals.description: A Power BI report is viewed.
Report data is exported to Excel, CSV, or PDF.
Underlying customer-level or row-level data is exported.
A report or dashboard is shared.

signalCategories.description: Composite signals that emerge from combining multiple lower-level activities across time and context.

signals.description: A user downloads an unusually high number of files or unusually sensitive files.
Multiple risky events correlate into a suspicious or ambiguous user behavior chain.
A contextual HR signal exists, such as role change, resignation, or performance action.
Sensitive file activity occurs outside normal working hours.

correlationRules.ruleName: External Sharing of Regulated Financial Data
correlationRules.description: Detects when regulated financial files are shared or emailed externally.
correlationRules.riskScoreFormula: base 40 + label weight + external recipient weight + DLP match weight
recommendedInvestigation: Check whether sharing was blocked or allowed

correlationRules.description: Detects a sensitivity label downgrade followed by external sharing or email.
correlationRules.riskScoreFormula: base 50 + downgrade weight + external action weight + override weight
recommendedInvestigation: Interview or coach user if needed

correlationRules.ruleName: External AI Use with Sensitive Banking Content
correlationRules.description: Detects sensitive content being copied or uploaded to an unmanaged AI application.
correlationRules.riskScoreFormula: base 55 + unmanaged app weight + content sensitivity weight + download proximity weight
recommendedInvestigation: Determine whether content was synthetic or real
Check whether approved Copilot alternative exists
Provide user coaching or restrict app

correlationRules.description: Detects AI interaction referencing files that should not be broadly discoverable.
correlationRules.riskScoreFormula: base 35 + sensitive source weight + overpermissioned content weight
recommendedInvestigation: Review source files referenced by Copilot

correlationRules.ruleName: Endpoint Movement of Sensitive Financial File
correlationRules.description: Detects download followed by print, USB copy, or network share copy.
correlationRules.riskScoreFormula: base 30 + endpoint action weight + sensitivity weight + volume weight
recommendedInvestigation: Review user role and business justification
Determine whether printing or copy was allowed
Apply endpoint DLP restrictions if needed

correlationRules.ruleName: Risky Sign-In Followed by Sensitive Download
correlationRules.description: Detects identity risk followed by access or download of sensitive files.
correlationRules.riskScoreFormula: base 60 + risky sign-in weight + sensitive file weight + download volume weight
recommendedInvestigation: Consider session revocation and password reset in real environments

correlationRules.ruleName: Guest Access to Sensitive Collaboration Space
correlationRules.description: Detects guest addition followed by sensitive file access or sharing.
correlationRules.riskScoreFormula: base 30 + guest access weight + sensitive file weight + download weight
recommendedInvestigation: Review files accessible to the guest

correlationRules.ruleName: Role Change Followed by Mass Download
correlationRules.description: Detects a contextual HR signal followed by mass or sensitive file downloads.
correlationRules.riskScoreFormula: base 65 + HR context weight + sensitive action weight + endpoint action weight
recommendedInvestigation: Check for external sharing or endpoint movement
Preserve ambiguity until reviewed by HR, Legal, and Security

scoreBands.recommendedAction: Review context and validate business purpose.
Open investigation, review user activity, and consider remediation.
Immediate security review, containment, HR/Legal coordination if user-risk context exists.

codexUsageGuidance: Use signalCategories to normalize expected telemetry into consistent synthetic event names.
Use correlationRules to group individual activity events into investigation narratives.
Use scenarioSignalMappings to validate whether each complex scenario produced the intended signal chain.
Use riskScoringModel to assign a synthetic severity score for dashboards or investigation timelines.
Treat all signal names as orchestration intent names unless mapped to exact Microsoft Purview or Defender export schemas later.
